parameters.content:
## LTX 2.3 Text-to-Video

This workflow finds the most available `ltx23-*` model first, then runs text-to-video.

### Setup
1. Install `n8n-nodes-sogni`
2. Add Sogni credentials
3. Click Test Workflow

### Why dynamic selection?
- LTX 2.3 model IDs can change as new presets land
- This avoids hardcoding a specific model ID
- Frames are set to an `8n+1` safe value for LTX

nodes.name: Get All Models
nodes.notes: Fetches all currently available Sogni models

nodes.name: Select LTX 2.3 Model
nodes.notes: Picks the LTX 2.3 model with the most workers

parameters.videoPositivePrompt: A cinematic tracking shot through a rain-soaked cyberpunk market at night, volumetric lighting, reflective puddles, smooth camera motion

videoSettings.negativePrompt: blurry, noisy, warped faces, jitter, flicker

nodes.name: Generate LTX 2.3 Video
nodes.notes: Uses the selected LTX 2.3 model for text-to-video generation
